items.impact: all 6 consoles are design-only; no operator surface exists yet
explanation patterns declared; no renderer wired into the runtime CLI
queue claim semantics declared; no mediator enforces concurrency ceiling
operator id is a free string in flows.py; no identity verification
executable workflows declare halts; runtime CLI has only auto-decide path
ergonomic principles declare ceilings; no throttle exists yet
explanation determinism is asserted, not yet tested
no instrumentation to measure operator decision time / abandonment
no executable reviewer registry, queue store, event log, binding store; 132 candidates still await elevation
